failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Install inline filter before BPR and ensure regular maintenance
Limit residence time at high temperatures and monitor solvent condition

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Conduct thermal stability test of solvent at 120°C for 24 hours; analyze for degradation products
Perform flow test with inline filter installed; check for pressure stability and flow consistency
